retry_reason: Release callback is invoked exactly once by kref_put when refcount hits zero; no failure path or retry possible.
contract_summary: This is the release callback for batadv_tt_local_entry's kref. It releases the vlan reference via batadv_meshif_vlan_put and frees the entry via kfree_rcu. The caller (kref_put) invokes this only when the refcount drops to zero; after this function executes, the entry is freed and must not be accessed again. No further puts should occur. No special locking required beyond what kref provides.
